meta.title: Uganda natural resources catalog
meta.description: Structured catalog for research expansion. Each entry must cite a source_id from bibliography.json before publication.
meta.data_policy: Only add quantitative claims when backed by a bibliography id or peer-reviewed DOI.

categories.name: Industrial & development minerals
categories.description: Materials supporting construction, manufacturing, and local value chains — priority for balanced, non-export-only development.

categories.name: Energy transition synergies
categories.description: Renewable energy co-location with extractives and industry (ground PV, floating PV, geothermal where documented).

categories.name: Metallic minerals
categories.description: Documented in national inventories; include only with DGSM or formal feasibility references.

resources.name: High-purity silica (glass) sand — Lake Victoria littoral
resources.summary: Quartz-rich beach sands along Lake Victoria; historically used for domestic glass (e.g. East African Glass Works, Bukakata, 1960s). DGSM lists viable glass-sand investment targets with reported high SiO₂ at specific sites.

resources.name: Dimension stone (granite, marble, slate)
resources.summary: Significant development-mineral sector per DELVE baseline; potential for regulated quarrying with concurrent reclamation rather than unplanned pits.

resources.name: Limestone
resources.summary: Feedstock for cement and lime; coupling with domestic construction demand reduces import pressure.

resources.name: Kaolin / ball clay
resources.summary: Ceramics and industrial mineral feedstocks; BGS report references Mutaka and related clay resources alongside Diimu silica.

resources.name: Salt (brine / lake evaporation)
resources.summary: Development mineral with established artisanal mining; requires social and environmental safeguards distinct from silica case study.

resources.name: Gypsum
resources.summary: Listed in DELVE development-minerals baseline; expand with district-level DGSM maps before quantitative claims.

resources.name: Geothermal energy (mineral-energy nexus)
resources.summary: The Mining and Minerals Act, 2022 also covers geothermal resource regulation — relevant for industrial heat and power distinct from FPV on sand pits.

resources.name: Floating photovoltaics on controlled water bodies
resources.summary: Belgian precedent: Sibelco Floating PV (7 MWp) on quarry water. Uganda equatorial heat may benefit from water-cooling; requires hydrological and ecological impact assessment on Lake Victoria vs. closed pits.

resources.name: Construction sand — Lwera wetland system
resources.summary: Major construction-sand source with documented wetland loss (GIS thesis) and reported NEMA restoration agreements. Distinct from glass-grade Diimu sands but central to 'balanced development' and environmental governance research.

resources.name: Iron ore — southwest and eastern Uganda
resources.summary: DGSM 2024 lists multiple iron occurrences with reported tonnages and Fe grades (e.g. Muko ~152 Mt at 60–65% Fe; Sukulu complex). Requires feasibility and environmental baseline before citing in economic models.

resources.name: Phosphate — Sukulu deposit (Tororo)
resources.summary: DGSM describes Sukulu phosphate as strategically significant (reported indicated/inferred tonnages). Linked to niobium/tantalite and iron in same complex — integrated planning challenge.

resources.name: Tin
localities: Listed in DGSM inventory (see report tables)
resources.summary: Metallic mineral with industrial uses (solder, coatings). Document details and districts in DGSM 2024 tables — expand with site-specific EIA before production claims.

resources.name: Gold (artisanal and industrial)
localities: See DGSM 2024 and Uganda EITI reports
resources.summary: Major ASM and industrial gold activity; EITI and 2022 Act address licensing and transparency. Not part of Lommel silica parallel but relevant to 'resource-rich, less commercialized' regional planning.
